hooks.command: cd /c/Users/rifee/siamexpat-refonte && if [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then exit 0; fi && echo '🔨 Building...' && npx next build > /tmp/claude-build.log 2>&1 || (echo '❌ BUILD FAILED — push annulé:' >&2; tail -20 /tmp/claude-build.log >&2; exit 1) && git add -A && git commit -m "auto: $(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M) — claude push" --quiet && git push --quiet 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo '✅ Pushé sur GitHub'
